message_text: I do want to clear this loan, but I cannot pay the full amount today.

I’m an AI agent for Nira, and this conversation is being logged. I understand that you're facing a hardship and want to clear the Nira loan ending ****4831, but cannot pay the full amount today. I’ve noted that. You asked to be contacted only if a concrete approved option is available, so I will flag this for hardship review and handoff. We will not continue outreach unless there is an approved option to share.

Thanks, please reach out only if there’s a concrete approved payment plan I can realistically manage after my salary is credited.

Understood. I’ve recorded that you want to be contacted only if a concrete approved option is available after your salary is credited. Based on the available policy data, I can confirm only that any payment arrangement must stay within a 30-day window, and exact approved hardship-compatible plan or reduced-closure terms are not available to quote in this turn. No arrangement is finalized. We will only re-engage if a concrete approved option becomes available.

Limited contact preference was reiterated; stop-contact flag was already present in case context and should be respected operationally.
